title: AN ACT INCREASING THE SALARIES OF THE JUDGES OF THE CITY COURT OF MANILA

chunks.text:
H. No. 9044 / 66 OG No. 21, 5192-24 (May 25, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4628, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE SALARIES OF THE JUDGES OF THE CITY COURT OF MANILA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Subparagraph (

a

) of Section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred twenty-four, as amended, is hereby further amended to read as follows:

"(

a

) Of the City of Manila, seventeen thousand pesos;"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
